manifest.author: Flavio Azurita

manifest.description: Use S3 providers and/or Eagle to manage vault attachments locally and remotely.

manifest.name: Safe Filename Linter
manifest.description: Lints filenames for invalid or troublesome characters

manifest.name: Safe JS

manifest.name: Saloon

manifest.author: 1yx

manifest.description: Visualize notes as points on a 2D chart using any numeric properties. Find patterns, spot outliers, prioritize visually.

manifest.description: Visual drag-and-drop calendar for daily and weekly schedule notes.

manifest.description: Streamline Research Workflow in Obsidian

manifest.author: Zhao-Jun Yong
manifest.name: Scholar Quest

manifest.author: Mark Lavercombe

manifest.description: Paste a DOI, PMID, ISBN, or arXiv ID and replace it with a formatted citation. 10,000+ CSL styles. Check retraction and open-access status. Verify suspect citations. No reference manager required.

manifest.author: s1n4sh4
manifest.name: Scholia
manifest.description: Import academic PDFs and precompute context-aware hover glossary explanations.
